name: rplryan/x402-payment-harness
snippet:
Use this harness as your client to test every payment edge case — invalid signatures, expired nonces, wrong amounts — without building a custom test client.
EOA-based test harness for x402 micropayments. Sign and send EIP-712 TransferWithAuthorization payments from a local private key — no CDP dependencies, no wallet API, no cloud signing.

name: x402 Explained | Build a Payment-gated API Using Stablecoins
snippet: Learn how x402 works and build your own x402 payment -gated API using Next.js and Thirdweb's x402 facilitator to accept USDC payments over HTTP.

name: x402 SDKs & Libraries Hub - xpay
snippet:
Our SDKs provide developers with type-safe, well-documented, and battle- tested tools for implementing x402 payments with minimal friction. Key Statistics.
